programme.title: 🌊 2.6m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That onshore wind will make those 2.6m waves a bumpy, short-lived affair, perfect for practicing duckdives.
🌊 Swell: 2.6m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 8.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 17.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 💨 1.8m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 1.8m swell's fighting a losing battle against this wind, so bring a snorkel and a healthy dose of optimism.
🌊 Swell: 1.8m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 34.0km/h SW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 54.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.1m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy • Significant wind chop

programme.desc:

programme.desc:
